raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I paid {$350.00} to XXXX ( booking # XXXX ) for a XXXX hotel stay at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XX/XX/XXXX - XX/XX/XXXX ). 

On the second night of my stay, I discovered my hotel room was infested with XXXX XXXX. This made the entire room uninhabitable. I complained to the front desk. They only changed the sheets and did not move me to a new room. I have photographic evidence of XXXX XXXX on the bed sheets ( taken XX/XX/XXXX ) and XXXX XXXX XXXX on my body ( taken XX/XX/XXXX ). 

On XX/XX/XXXX ( checkout day ), XXXXl XXXX XXXX agreed to refund XXXX nights of my stay. On XX/XX/XXXX, I emailed XXXX with all photos, invoices, and proof requesting a refund. XXXX ignored my email and never responded. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I filed a chargeback dispute with Citibank ( Case ID : XXXX ) for the full amount of {$350.00}. 

Citibank 's failure : During the investigation, Citibank never asked me to submit my photographic evidence. They never gave me an opportunity to provide my side of the story or the supporting documents I had. Without ever seeing my proof of the XXXX XXXX XXXX, Citibank closed the case on XX/XX/XXXX, ruling against me because " the merchant provided documentation that services were completed. '' I reviewed the documentation XXXX sent to Citibank. It was a blank, incomplete template with no merchant signature, no amount, no consumer name, and no evidence. It was clearly an unprofessional and insufficient rebuttal. 

Citibank ruled against me without ever reviewing my photos of the XXXX XXXX, the XXXX on the sheets, or the XXXX on my body. This was an unfair and incomplete investigation. 

What I want : I am requesting that Citibank reopen my dispute ( Case ID : XXXX ), review my photographic evidence, and reverse their decision by issuing a full refund of {$350.00} to my account. 

What I have already done to resolve this : Emailed XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX with all evidence no response Filed a chargeback with Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX Citibank closed the case on XX/XX/XXXX without reviewing my evidence Supporting documents I am attaching : Photos of XXXX XXXX on hotel bed ( taken XX/XX/XXXX ) Photos of XXXX XXXX XXXX on my body ( taken XX/XX/XXXX ) Copy of email sent to XXXX ( XX/XX/XXXX ) Citibank 's investigation closure letter ( XX/XX/XXXX ) The blank, incomplete document XXXX sent to Citibank as their " defense ''
